scripts.restart:full: bash stop-services.sh && npm run build && bash start-services.sh
scripts.build: node --check bff/src/server.js && node --check superapp-service/src/server.js && python3 -m py_compile ai-service/app/main.py ai-service/app/core/config.py ai-service/app/core/tracing.py ai-service/app/observability/events.py ai-service/app/observability/logger.py ai-service/app/infra/llm/snapshot.py ai-service/app/infra/llm/client.py ai-service/app/domain/interview/parsers.py ai-service/app/domain/interview/validators.py ai-service/app/engine/control_intents.py ai-service/app/engine/tutor_policy.py ai-service/app/engine/context_packet.py ai-service/app/engine/turn_envelope.py ai-service/app/engine/tutor_intelligence.py ai-service/app/engine/session_engine.py ai-service/app/interview_assist/__init__.py ai-service/app/interview_assist/service.py ai-service/app/interview_assist/aliyun_realtime_asr.py && npm run build --prefix frontend && bash -n start-dev.sh
scripts.e2e:web:start-frontend: npm run build --prefix frontend && sh -c 'cd frontend && node node_modules/next/dist/bin/next start -p ${E2E_FRONTEND_PORT:-13000}'
scripts.verify:real: E2E_USE_EXISTING_SERVICES=1 E2E_FRONTEND_PORT=3000 E2E_BFF_PORT=4000 playwright test tests/e2e/focus-reading.pw.spec.js --workers=1
scripts.deliver:real: npm run restart:full && npm run verify:real
scripts.test: node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/e2e/split-services.spec.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/integration/ai-service/parity-flow.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/integration/ai-service/observability-flow.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/integration/ai-service/automated-eval-module.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/integration/user/profile-flow.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/integration/interview-assist/flow.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/unit/split-entrypoints.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/unit/interview-assist-contract.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 tests/unit/superapp/reminder-candidate.test.js
